name: Healthcare Diagnostic AI
description: Clinical decision-support deployment where safety, robustness, privacy, and accountability requirements are strict.

source_reference.citation: Scenario synthesized for MEDF evaluation from healthcare AI governance guidance and diagnostic safety literature.

assumptions: Scores are analyst-assigned Likert estimates for a deployment-like clinical decision support workflow and not a benchmark from one hospital product.
The cited WHO publication is used as governance reference context, not as a direct metric source for this synthetic profile.
Scenario assumes clinicians remain accountable for final diagnosis and treatment decisions.
